Logs.Comment:
Hi, I'm Ebony and I'm the manager of the Messaging Team here at UK Power Networks.

�You may notice that we have less of our teams, vehicles and partners in the Barclay Road, London E17 9 area after today. I wanted to offer you my personal reassurance that even though we have less physical presence on site, our partners, Haste, will still be working to visit each property to repair or replace damaged equipment.

�Should you need to speak to Haste, they can be contacted on 01730 897100. As this will be the last message from my team, I wanted to extend a final and sincere apology for the inconvenience caused by what has been a very uncommon and complex fault with our network. Thank you.

Steps.Message:
Sent by Will at 20:29 - Just to let you know that our Customer Support Vehicle, Customer Service staff and food van will all be leaving the Lyndhurst Gardens area for tonight shortly, however, they will be back tomorrow. They remain on site until approximately 21:00 to allow those who still need support the chance to visit before we leave.

I appreciate that having to ready yourself for another night with no power must be worrying, and we're still doing everything we can to get the lights back on. We'll be here to keep you updated, and if you have any questions or concerns, don't hesitate to call us on 08003163105.
Steps.Name: Customer Service Team

Steps.Message:
Just a quick reminder that our customer support vehicle is still on site. It's located opposite 73 Lancing Road and is ready to provide extra support to anyone affected by the power cut. We also have our customer service team still in the area to answer any questions you may have.

We appreciate that around this time of day people will be coming home from school/work and will be worried about dinner but the food van is still available to anyone affected, and this is located nearby outside 758 Eastern Avenue.

If you have someone in your property or know of someone who needs extra care or cannot travel to the vehicle, please let us know by calling 105. Sent by Will at 16:34.

We know that being without power can be especially difficult, so we're sorry for the outage. Please rest assured our staff will continue to work around the clock to keep the lights on.

If your power isn't on or there's anything you'd like to talk to us about, call us on 08003163105 which is free from landlines and mobiles.
Steps.Name: Customer Service Team

Steps.Message: Our engineers have arrived on site in the White City Close area, the estimated time of between 14:30 and 15:30 hasn't changed. We know that a power cut can be very disruptive; we understand this can greatly impact your daily activities and we want to support you however we can. We'll update you with all of our progress, but if you need to speak to us, call our team on 08003163105 any time. Sent by Bev at 00:55 - I'm pleased to confirm that all power in the Maldon Road  area should be back on. The issue was caused by an unexpected underground cable fault, which our engineers have been able to divert power around.

We know that a power cut can be difficult, and I'm sorry for the length of the time you were without your electricity. Please rest assured that our staff will continue to work around the clock to keep the lights on.

If your power isn't on or there's anything you'd like to talk to us about, call us on 08003163105 which is free from landlines and mobiles.
Steps.Name: Customer Service Team

Steps.Message:
We're sorry we've not been able to restore your power yet. We appreciate it can be unsettling to have a power cut during the night, but our engineers work 24 hours on issues like this so we're still aiming to have power restored as soon as possible.

If you light candles, please be mindful of them and take extra care when using the stairs. If you have any concerns, please call us on 105 and our team will help. We'll keep you updated. Sent by Bev at 23:54
Steps.Name: Customer Service Team

What will happen next?

This outage affects multiple areas, so locations we mention may be further away than you expect. We're arranging staff to attend ASAP, but at the same time we try to restore power remotely by redirecting electricity. It's possible your power may go on and off as we try to get as many customers back on as we can.

Once available, our engineer will head to the local substation and after checking the network, they will attempt to restore more power from there. If unsuccessful, they will work to locate the issue and make repairs, which may take longer to get the lights on.

Our staff work as quickly as they can, so you might not hear about everything we're doing but we'll always give you the clearest information we have.

This was a widespread problem on the overhead network and I personally apologise for any disruption this has caused to your day. If you have any questions or are still without power, please call us on 105.

Great news - Our engineers have now restored power to all 1204 customers in the Ely CB6 2 area by cutting trees away from our overhead cabling and making repairs.

Thank you for your patience while our team worked hard to resolve the issue safely. We apologise the outage lasted longer than anticipated and we appreciate your understanding.

If your power isn't back on, we'll need to hear from you. To report this, or to talk to us about anything else, call us on 08003163105 which is free from landlines and mobiles.

Steps.Message: All power in the area should be back on. We’re really sorry for any disruption this caused.
Steps.Name: Power back on

PlannedIncidentReason: We're carrying out planned work in your area. For our engineers to carry it out safely they need to turn the power off. We're doing this work as it's essential to provide reliable electricity supplies to your area. We're sorry for any inconvenience caused and thank you for your patience.
MainMessage: We are currently experiencing problems with the electricity supply in your area.  We are arranging to have engineers investigate the fault.  We are sorry we can't give you a time for the restoration of supply at present. Please accept our sincere apologies for any inconvenience this may cause.
